ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin (e.g., UART2_TX) */,
  "pin_type" TEXT /* Type of the pin (e.g., Digital, Analog) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pin's purpose */,
  "functionality" TEXT /* Functionality associated with the pin */,
  "gpio_number" INTEGER /* GPIO number associated with the pin */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module the pin belongs to */,
  "electrical_characteristics" TEXT /* Electrical characteristics of the pin (e.g., voltage and current ratings) */,
  "physical_characteristics" TEXT /* Physical characteristics of the pin (e.g., its location on the board) */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., UART, GPIO, SPI) */,
  "signal_direction" TEXT /* Signal direction (e.g., input, output, bidirectional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pins_pin_type FOREIGN KEY ("pin_type") REFERENCES pin_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pins_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module (e.g., UART Module) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module's purpose */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the module */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility information (e.g., compatible with specific boards or firmware versions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin type (e.g., Digital, Analog) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pin type */,
  "electrical_characteristics" TEXT /* Electrical characteristics of the pin type (e.g., voltage and current ratings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the pin */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the pin was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, update) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pin was accessed */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access (e.g., reason for accessing the pin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_access_logs_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the pin configuration */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the pin was modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who modified the pin */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version (e.g., reason for the change) */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_versions_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin associated with the document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document (e.g., datasheet, user manual) */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., datasheet, user manual) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_documents_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin associated with the test result */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was performed */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test (e.g., reason for the test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_test_results_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)
